name: Public Relations
purpose: Handles external communications strategy, press messaging, media response framing, announcement positioning, reputational considerations, and narrative control.
trigger_conditions: Request involves a public announcement, press release, or external narrative
Request involves reputation-sensitive events, crises, or media response
Request involves a company launch, milestone, or news with media implications
Request involves talking points for external audiences including media, analysts, or public
Request involves external communications strategy or narrative positioning
anti_trigger_conditions: Request is purely internal — no external audience or public component
Request is investor-relations only without public communications component
Request is customer-facing content without a PR/reputation dimension
Request is legal analysis without reputational framing needed
